description: Use this API to return the message string associated with a specific error code returned from a recordable PSSE API routine. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.4.0. ierr, string = apierrstr(api, errcode)

return_values.name: string
return_values.description: Error message for api and errcode. (output).

error_codes.description: API not found; ‘STRING’ set to spaces.
ERRCODE out of range; ‘STRING’ set to spaces.
